description: The Chief Audit Executive (CAE) prepares materials for the quarterly Audit Committee meeting.

nodes.task_description: Summarize all audit reports issued during the quarter.

expected_outcome.value: A concise summary of recent audit activity is created.

nodes.task_description: Create a dashboard showing the status of all open audit findings, highlighting any that are past their remediation due date.

expected_outcome.value: A clear visual dashboard on remediation status is generated.

nodes.task_description: Compile the materials into a formal presentation deck for the Audit Committee.

expected_outcome.value: A professional presentation is ready for the board-level meeting.
